title: stapelia woodfordiana
intro: Stapelia woodfordiana, also known as the starfish cactus, is a species of succulent plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing and immune system support. The plant's extracts can be used in herbal preparations, including topical creams and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties. Further research is needed to fully understand the efficacy and potential uses of Stapelia woodfordiana in modern medicine.
